name: tech-vectordb-overview
description: Use web_search to search for 'vector database comparison 2025 2026 Pinecone Weaviate Milvus'. Summarize the vector DB landscape in 3 bullet points. Keep response under 100 words.

ground_truth.reference_answer:
- The vector database market is dominated by Pinecone (fully managed serverless, easiest onboarding), Weaviate (open-source with best-in-class hybrid search and GraphQL API), and Milvus (open-source, distributed, optimized for billion-scale deployments with GPU acceleration).
- Benchmarks show Milvus/Zilliz leading in latency (<10ms p50), with Pinecone and Qdrant at 20-50ms, and Weaviate slightly higher but offering richer query capabilities.
- The market is projected to grow from $2.65B (2025) to $8.95B (2030) at 27.5% CAGR, driven by RAG adoption and generative AI workloads.
key_facts: Pinecone is fully managed and serverless with no self-hosted option, optimized for minimal operational overhead
Milvus is open-source and distributed, supporting billions of vectors with GPU acceleration and 11 index types
Weaviate excels at hybrid search combining vector similarity, BM25 keyword matching, and metadata filtering natively
Benchmarks show Milvus/Zilliz with sub-10ms p50 latency on 768-dim embeddings
The vector database market is expected to reach $8.95B by 2030 at 27.5% CAGR
